## LibraryRuntime.RuntimeProducedFilling.setIngredient() method

Sets or updates an ingredient. Pushes current state to undo before change, clears redo.

**Signature:**

```typescript
setIngredient(id: IngredientId, amount: Measurement, unit?: MeasurementUnit, modifiers?: IIngredientModifiers): Result<void>;
```
